Now I have a thorough understanding of the codebase. Let me produce the specification.

---

## 1. Problem Statement

Feature IDs are currently cryptic timestamps with random suffixes (e.g., `project-02140625-2026-abc123def`) that are meaningless to users. Features are stored flat under `.dmaker/features/` making it difficult to find features by date, and the internal folder structure (`feature.json`, `agent-output.md`, `images/`, `summaries/`) lacks a dedicated `logs/` and `backups/` folder for organized output management.

## 2. User Story

As a developer using DMaker, I want feature IDs to be human-readable (e.g., `2-2026-Restore_Summary_tab_dropdown`), features organized by month (e.g., `.dmaker/features/February/`), and feature output organized into 4 clear subfolders (images, summaries, logs, backups), so that I can easily identify, browse, and manage features on disk.

## 3. Acceptance Criteria

**Happy Path - New Feature Creation:**
- GIVEN a user creates a feature with title "Restore Summary tab dropdown and fix missing Logs display it"
- WHEN the feature is created on February 2, 2026
- THEN the feature ID is `2-2026-Restore_Summary_tab_dropdown`
- AND the feature is stored at `.dmaker/features/February/2-2026-Restore_Summary_tab_dropdown/`
- AND the feature directory contains subfolders: `images/`, `summaries/`, `logs/`, `backups/`

**Happy Path - Agent Output:**
- GIVEN a feature is running and producing agent output
- WHEN the agent writes output
- THEN agent output is stored at `logs/agent-output.md` within the feature directory
- AND raw output goes to `logs/raw-output.jsonl`

**Edge Case - No Title at Creation:**
- GIVEN a user creates a feature without a title (title generated later)
- WHEN the feature is created
- THEN the ID uses a fallback like `2-2026-untitled_{random4}`
- AND when title is later generated, the ID remains unchanged (IDs are immutable)

**Edge Case - Duplicate Titles:**
- GIVEN a feature with title "Fix Login Bug" already exists
- WHEN another feature with the same title is created on the same day
- THEN the second feature gets a suffix like `2-2026-Fix_Login_Bug_2`

**Edge Case - Title with Special Characters:**
- GIVEN a feature title contains special characters like `"Fix: auth (OAuth2) - login!"`
- WHEN the feature is created
- THEN special characters are sanitized to produce `2-2026-Fix_auth_OAuth2_login`

**Backward Compatibility - Old Features:**
- GIVEN existing features with old IDs (e.g., `feature-1768723644702-jisrx6am7` or `project-02140625-2026-abc123`)
- WHEN features are loaded
- THEN old features are still found and loaded correctly from their existing locations
- AND the system does not break or lose data

**Error Handling:**
- GIVEN the month directory does not yet exist
- WHEN a feature is created
- THEN the month directory is created automatically

## 4. Technical Context

| Aspect | Value |
|--------|-------|
| Affected Files | `libs/platform/src/paths.ts`, `apps/server/src/services/feature-loader.ts`, `apps/ui/src/lib/utils.ts`, `apps/server/src/services/auto-mode-service.ts` (agent-output.md references), `apps/ui/src/store/app-store.ts` (generateFeatureId import), and all test files |
| Dependencies | None (no new external libs) |
| Constraints | Must maintain backward compatibility with old feature IDs; IDs must be filesystem-safe; month folder names must be consistent |
| Patterns to Follow | Existing path resolution via `@dmaker/platform`, existing `FeatureLoader` class patterns, existing `atomicWriteJson`/`readJsonWithRecovery` patterns |

## 5. Non-Goals

- **Migrating existing features**: Old features remain in their current location with their current IDs. No automatic migration.
- **Renaming features when title changes**: Once an ID is generated, it is immutable.
- **Changing the Feature type interface ID field**: The `id` field on `Feature` remains a string.
- **Changing how the UI displays feature IDs**: UI display logic is out of scope.

## 6. Implementation Tasks

```tasks
## Phase 1: Core ID Generation & Path Resolution

- [ ] T001: Update `generateFeatureId()` in `apps/ui/src/lib/utils.ts` to produce `{day}-{year}-{First_4_Words}` format | File: apps/ui/src/lib/utils.ts
- [ ] T002: Update `generateFeatureId()` in `apps/server/src/services/feature-loader.ts` to match the new format | File: apps/server/src/services/feature-loader.ts
- [ ] T003: Add `getMonthName()` helper and update `getFeatureDir()` in `libs/platform/src/paths.ts` to support month-based directory structure, with backward-compatible fallback for old IDs | File: libs/platform/src/paths.ts
- [ ] T004: Update `getFeaturesDir()` and add `getFeatureMonthDir()` helper in `libs/platform/src/paths.ts` | File: libs/platform/src/paths.ts
- [ ] T005: Add `getFeatureLogsDir()` and `getFeatureBackupsDir()` path helpers in `libs/platform/src/paths.ts` | File: libs/platform/src/paths.ts

## Phase 2: Feature Loader Updates

- [ ] T006: Update `FeatureLoader.getAgentOutputPath()` and `getRawOutputPath()` to use `logs/` subdirectory | File: apps/server/src/services/feature-loader.ts
- [ ] T007: Update `FeatureLoader.create()` to create all 4 subfolders (images, summaries, logs, backups) on feature creation | File: apps/server/src/services/feature-loader.ts
- [ ] T008: Update `FeatureLoader.getAll()` to scan month subdirectories under features/ as well as flat feature directories (backward compat) | File: apps/server/src/services/feature-loader.ts
- [ ] T009: Update `FeatureLoader.getAllSummaries()` to scan month subdirectories | File: apps/server/src/services/feature-loader.ts
- [ ] T010: Update `FeatureLoader.getFeatureDir()` to resolve month-based paths for new features and flat paths for old features | File: apps/server/src/services/feature-loader.ts

## Phase 3: Auto-Mode Service Updates

- [ ] T011: Update all `agent-output.md` path constructions in `auto-mode-service.ts` to use `logs/agent-output.md` | File: apps/server/src/services/auto-mode-service.ts
- [ ] T012: Update all `raw-output.jsonl` path constructions in `auto-mode-service.ts` to use `logs/raw-output.jsonl` | File: apps/server/src/services/auto-mode-service.ts
- [ ] T013: Update `loadPendingFeatures()` and `resumeInterruptedFeatures()` in auto-mode-service to scan month subdirectories | File: apps/server/src/services/auto-mode-service.ts

## Phase 4: Test Updates

- [ ] T014: Update feature-loader tests for new ID format and month-based directory scanning | File: apps/server/tests/unit/services/feature-loader.test.ts
- [ ] T015: Update platform paths tests for new path helpers | File: libs/platform/tests/paths.test.ts
- [ ] T016: Update auto-mode-service tests for new log paths | File: apps/server/tests/unit/services/auto-mode-service.test.ts
- [ ] T017: Update any UI test utilities that reference old feature ID format | File: apps/ui/tests/utils/project/setup.ts
```

## 7. Success Metrics

- New features get human-readable IDs like `2-2026-Restore_Summary_tab_dropdown`
- New features are stored under `.dmaker/features/{MonthName}/{featureId}/`
- Each new feature directory contains `images/`, `summaries/`, `logs/`, `backups/` subdirectories
- Agent output is written to `logs/agent-output.md` and `logs/raw-output.jsonl`
- Old features with legacy IDs still load and function correctly
- All existing server unit tests pass (or are updated to match new behavior)
- `npm run test:server` and `npm run test:packages` pass

## 8. Risks & Mitigations

| Risk | Mitigation |
|------|------------|
| Old features become inaccessible after the change | `getAll()` scans both flat directories and month subdirectories; `getFeatureDir()` checks old paths as fallback |
| Feature ID collisions (same title, same day) | Append numeric suffix `_2`, `_3` etc. when duplicate detected |
| Title not available at creation time (generated async) | Use fallback `untitled_{random4}` when no title provided |
| Very long titles creating unwieldy IDs | Limit to first 4 words of title, max ~60 chars total |
| Special characters in title breaking filesystem | Sanitize: replace non-alphanumeric with underscore, collapse consecutive underscores |
| `auto-mode-service.ts` has many hardcoded `agent-output.md` paths | Systematically replace all with `logs/agent-output.md`; use `getAgentOutputPath()` helper where possible |
